ideas.why_trending: Melbourne Connect (29 Apr) is in the rear-view. This week, accounts want follow-up: proof, recap, and what to do next. Strong moment for case studies, unified commerce, and AI enablement assets.
ideas.linkedin_draft:
Last week, retail and ecommerce leaders came together in Melbourne for Shopify Connect.

The through-line in the room: unifying data, staff, and channels is no longer a nice-to-have, it is the baseline for growth.

If you are turning those conversations into next steps, the content that lands is specific: local proof, clear POS and online story, and a credible AI path (not buzzwords).

What is the one follow-up resource you are sending to prospects this week?

#ShopifyConnect #ANZ #Retail #eCommerce #UnifiedCommerce #Shopify
sources: Programme: post-event nurture and sales follow-up (May 2026)

ideas.why_trending: Executive conversations still heating up. May 14 roundtable slot remains a natural hook; Australia Post eCommerce Report 2026 continues to anchor local stats on AI-assisted shopping behaviour.
ideas.linkedin_draft:
Agentic commerce is the shift from "browse and buy" to systems that plan, compare, and purchase on the shopper's behalf.

The 2026 Australia Post eCommerce Report spells out how Australian consumers are already experimenting with AI-led discovery and checkout.

For brands, the question is not whether this shows up, it is whether you are visible and trustworthy when it does.

Worth a read if you are briefing leadership or a board this month.

Read the report: https://auspost.com.au/content/dam/ecommerce-report/australia-post-ecommerce-report-2026.pdf

#AgenticCommerce #AICommerce #eCommerce #ANZ #RetailTech #Shopify
related_assets: The Renaissance: Agentic Commerce — ShopForward (12 Mar 2026)

ideas.why_trending: With 8 weeks to 30 June, finance and ops leaders are locking budgets and vendor decisions. Good week for ROI-led decks, TCO-style narratives, and POS plus ecommerce unified stories.
ideas.linkedin_draft:
Australian EOFY is eight weeks out.

That matters for ecommerce and retail tech decisions: anything that touches revenue, cost of sale, or compliance gets extra scrutiny before 30 June.

If you are in active deals, lead with clarity: total cost of ownership, time to value, and how online and in-store roll up to one view of the business.

Leaders are not buying slides. They are buying a safer path through peak and EOFY reporting.

#EOFY #Retail #ANZ #Shopify #UnifiedCommerce #eCommerce

ANZ Burst Deck — Industry & Competitor Share

ideas.why_trending: Evergreen but urgent while Connect follow-ups are live: one inventory, one customer, campaigns in hours. Pair ANZ names prospects already know.
ideas.linkedin_draft:
Unified commerce sounds abstract until you spell it in outcomes.

One inventory truth across channels. One customer profile whether they walk in or check out online. Campaigns that do not need a three-week IT ticket.

In ANZ we keep seeing the same pattern: the retailers pulling ahead are the ones who stopped accepting "good enough" glue between store and ecommerce.

If your prospect runs separate stacks for POS and DTC, that is the conversation.

#UnifiedCommerce #ShopifyPOS #ANZ #Retail #Shopify
